meta.description: 5 prompts otimizados para lojas virtuais, marketplaces e produtos fisicos

prompts.name: Produto — Fundo Limpo
prompts.description: Produto em fundo branco limpo, sombras suaves, estudio softbox, ideal para catalogo

subject.description: Premium product centered on pure white background
subject.details: Sharp product detail, clean edges, true-to-life colors, slight reflection on surface

setting.background: Pure seamless white #FAFAF9 background, soft ground shadow
setting.props: None — isolated product only for maximum clarity

prompts.prompt_en: Premium product centered on pure seamless white #FAFAF9 background, sharp detail with clean edges, true-to-life colors, soft subtle ground shadow, slight reflection on glossy surface beneath, front studio softbox lighting at 5500K daylight color temperature, neutral mood, 85mm lens f/4, eye-level perspective, clean professional product photography for e-commerce catalog, no distracting elements, maximum clarity and crispness
prompts.prompt_midjourney: Premium product on pure white seamless background, sharp detail, clean edges, soft ground shadow, slight surface reflection, studio softbox front lighting, 85mm f/4, professional product photography, e-commerce catalog style, clean and crisp --ar 1:1 --s 100 --v 7
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, low quality, text, watermark, busy background, props, shadows too harsh, color cast, tilted, off-center, dust, scratches

prompts.name: Modelo — Lifestyle com Produto
prompts.description: Modelo usando produto em contexto de vida real, luz natural, estilo editorial

subject.description: Model naturally using product in lifestyle context
subject.details: Authentic expression, natural pose, product clearly visible and in use, stylish casual attire

setting.background: Trendy urban street with soft architectural bokeh, warm sunlit tones
setting.props: Complementary accessories, urban greenery, natural street elements

prompts.prompt_en: Medium shot of model naturally using product in urban lifestyle context, positioned in left-third composition, authentic relaxed expression, natural candid pose with product clearly visible and in use, stylish casual attire, trendy urban street background with soft architectural bokeh, golden hour light from camera-right at 4000K, warm sunlit tones, urban greenery and natural street elements, 50mm lens f/2.8, eye-level editorial photography, warm inviting mood, gold #F59E0B warm tones, emerald #10B981 greenery accents, charcoal #1F2937 attire contrast
prompts.prompt_midjourney: Model naturally using product on urban street, authentic relaxed pose, product clearly visible, stylish casual, soft architectural bokeh, golden hour light from right, warm tones, urban greenery, 50mm f/2.8, editorial lifestyle photography, warm inviting mood --ar 4:3 --s 200 --v 7
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, low quality, text, watermark, posed stock photo, fake smile, studio backdrop, harsh lighting, deformed hands, extra fingers, product obscured

prompts.name: Flat-Lay — Grade Organizada
prompts.description: Vista aerea de grade organizada de produtos, iluminacao uniforme, aspecto quadrado

subject.description: Organized grid arrangement of complementary products in flat-lay composition
subject.details: Symmetrical spacing, each item clearly visible, cohesive color story, satisfying alignment

setting.background: Clean matte surface in off-white #FAFAF9, uniform flat background
setting.props: Decorative botanical elements, texture swatches, brand color accent objects

prompts.prompt_en: Bird-eye flat-lay of organized product grid arrangement on clean matte off-white #FAFAF9 surface, symmetrical spacing with satisfying alignment, each item clearly visible, cohesive color story with coral #FF6B6B and emerald #10B981 accent objects, decorative botanical elements and texture swatches between products, even top studio softbox lighting at 5500K, no harsh shadows, 35mm lens f/8 for maximum sharpness across entire frame, commercial flat-lay photography style, clean organized aesthetic
prompts.prompt_midjourney: Bird-eye flat-lay product grid on off-white surface, symmetrical organized layout, each item visible, botanical decorations, coral and emerald accent objects, even top softbox lighting, no harsh shadows, 35mm f/8 everything sharp, commercial flat-lay style --ar 1:1 --s 150 --v 7
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, low quality, text, watermark, messy arrangement, uneven spacing, harsh shadows, perspective distortion, angled view, cluttered

prompts.name: Banner — Composicao Dinamica
prompts.description: Composicao dinamica com produto, espaco reservado para tipografia, cores vibrantes

subject.description: Hero product floating dynamically with energy and motion
subject.details: Product at dramatic angle, slight motion blur trail, vibrant color splashes around it

setting.background: Bold gradient from charcoal #1F2937 to deep coral, clear left-side space for headline text
setting.props: Abstract color splashes, geometric accent shapes, subtle particle effects

prompts.prompt_en: Dynamic hero product floating at dramatic angle in right-third composition, slight motion energy trail, vibrant color splashes of coral #FF6B6B and gold #F59E0B around product, bold gradient background from charcoal #1F2937 to deep coral, clear open space on left side reserved for headline text overlay, abstract geometric accent shapes, subtle particle effects, dramatic rim backlighting at 5500K, low-angle perspective, 50mm lens f/4, commercial e-commerce banner photography style, vibrant energetic mood
prompts.prompt_midjourney: Dynamic hero product floating dramatically in right-third, motion energy, vibrant coral and gold color splashes, gradient background charcoal to coral, clear left space for text, geometric accents, particles, dramatic rim backlight, low-angle, 50mm f/4, vibrant commercial banner style --ar 16:9 --s 250 --v 7
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, low quality, text, watermark, static boring composition, centered product, flat background, no energy, dull colors, cluttered left side

prompts.name: Unboxing — Momento de Excitacao
prompts.description: Maos abrindo embalagem, close-up, antecipacao e excitacao, luz quente

subject.description: Hands opening a beautifully designed product package
subject.details: Well-manicured hands pulling tissue paper, revealing product beneath, anticipation captured

setting.background: Warm cozy home surface, soft out-of-focus living room elements
setting.props: Premium packaging box with ribbon, tissue paper, small thank-you card visible

prompts.prompt_en: Close-up high-angle of hands opening a beautifully designed premium product package, well-manicured hands pulling back tissue paper revealing product beneath, moment of anticipation and excitement captured, premium box with satin ribbon, small thank-you card visible, warm cozy home surface, soft out-of-focus living room in background, natural window light from camera-left at 4000K, warm inviting mood, 50mm lens f/2.8, lifestyle unboxing photography, off-white #FAFAF9 packaging, gold #F59E0B ribbon accent, coral #FF6B6B card detail
prompts.prompt_midjourney: Close-up hands opening premium product package, tissue paper pulled back revealing product, anticipation moment, satin ribbon, thank-you card, cozy home surface, soft bokeh living room, natural window light from left, warm mood, 50mm f/2.8, lifestyle unboxing photography --ar 4:3 --s 200 --v 7
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, low quality, text, watermark, deformed hands, extra fingers, cheap packaging, harsh flash, cold lighting, messy surroundings
